eff_mass_summary.caption: Effective modal mass [kg] per case, summed over the captured modes in the global X/Y/Z directions. Code_Aster reports translational effective mass only.

eig_compare_line_o1_meff_x.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global X — line, order 1.

eig_compare_line_o1_meff_y.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Y — line, order 1.

eig_compare_line_o1_meff_z.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Z — line, order 1.

eig_compare_shell_o1_meff_x.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global X — shell, order 1.

eig_compare_shell_o1_meff_y.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Y — shell, order 1.

eig_compare_shell_o1_meff_z.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Z — shell, order 1.

eig_compare_shell_o2_meff_x.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global X — shell, order 2.

eig_compare_shell_o2_meff_y.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Y — shell, order 2.

eig_compare_shell_o2_meff_z.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Z — shell, order 2.

eig_compare_solid_o1_meff_x.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global X — solid, order 1.

eig_compare_solid_o1_meff_y.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Y — solid, order 1.

eig_compare_solid_o1_meff_z.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Z — solid, order 1.

eig_compare_solid_o2_meff_x.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global X — solid, order 2.

eig_compare_solid_o2_meff_y.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Y — solid, order 2.

eig_compare_solid_o2_meff_z.caption: Effective modal mass [kg], global Z — solid, order 2.
